programme.title: Engineering on the Edge
programme.desc: Trask and his crew take on New Bullards Dam, and they need to place critical target sensors for monitoring seismic activity; in Colorado, a bird detection system needs to be installed at a wind turbine facility.

programme.title: Engineering on the Edge
programme.desc: Trask and his crew scale Sutro Tower to inspect crucial cable junctions and must avoid deadly radiation at nearly 1,000 feet in the air; in Oregon, loose boulders need to be removed along a cliffside road that needs to be reopened.

programme.title: Engineering on the Edge
programme.desc: Trask and his team take on the iconic Space Needle in Seattle to fix an aging window-washing basket; in San Antonio, they look to get a stadium ready for game day.

programme.title: Engineering on the Edge
programme.desc: Trask and his crew look for any critical issues on Foresthill Bridge in California, a vital escape route during wildfires; in Garden City, Kan., the team needs to inspect massive grain elevators where one spark could ignite a devastating explosion.

programme.title: Engineering on the Edge
programme.desc: Trask and his crew take on one of the world's largest bronze statues, Pegasus and Dragon, and they need to figure out how to get on this colossus of a structure; one of the world's largest roller coasters is due for an inspection.

programme.title: Engineering on the Edge
programme.desc: Trask takes on a decommissioned lighthouse 32 miles off the coast of North Carolina, and the crew must work suspended above shark-infested waters; an aging stadium with corroding catwalks needs maintenance for hockey season.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes
programme.desc: A flash flood catastrophe brings one of America's most vital highways to a complete standstill in the California desert; using scientific methods, expert engineers investigate and discover how its bridge foundations lacked a crucial element.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes
programme.desc: A crane disastrously falls across two lanes of traffic during construction work on a landmark bridge in New York City.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes
programme.desc: An explosion at a chemical plant in New Jersey kills five workers and unleashes a torrent of black smoke into the morning sky; an investigation reveals how a small amount of water led to this fatal manufacturing catastrophe.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes in Puerto Rico as an explosion takes down a popular shoe shop.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes
programme.desc: There's shock in the Bronx, as a vast sinkhole swallows a van.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes
programme.desc: In Scotland, a distinguished library is ravaged by not one but two disastrous fires; experts explore how outdated construction methods and materials contributed to the vulnerability of this esteemed place of learning.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes in Puerto Rico as an explosion takes down a popular shoe shop.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes
programme.desc: There's shock in the Bronx, as a vast sinkhole swallows a van.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes
programme.desc: In Scotland, a distinguished library is ravaged by not one but two disastrous fires; experts explore how outdated construction methods and materials contributed to the vulnerability of this esteemed place of learning.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes
programme.desc: An explosion at a chemical plant in New Jersey kills five workers and unleashes a torrent of black smoke into the morning sky; an investigation reveals how a small amount of water led to this fatal manufacturing catastrophe.

programme.title: Engineering on the Edge
programme.desc: Trask and his crew take on one of the world's largest bronze statues, Pegasus and Dragon, and they need to figure out how to get on this colossus of a structure; one of the world's largest roller coasters is due for an inspection.

programme.title: Engineering on the Edge
programme.desc: Trask takes on a decommissioned lighthouse 32 miles off the coast of North Carolina, and the crew must work suspended above shark-infested waters; an aging stadium with corroding catwalks needs maintenance for hockey season.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: Spaceships powered by atomic bombs; artificial rings encircle an entire star; Neil Armstrong's transmission feed cuts off when he spots strange lights on the moon; how can lightning talk to itself.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: Astronauts evacuate when a mystery object hurtles toward the ISS; a NASA secret agent goes undercover to retrieve missing moon rocks; scientists struggle to find answers when they discover a huge void at the edge of the solar system.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: Lost tapes show that Apollo astronauts heard unexplained transmissions on the far side of the moon; an amateur astronomer finds an odd disturbance in Martian atmosphere; an unidentified object in Earth orbit starts stalking Russian spacecraft.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: New astronomical research is beginning to reveal an invisible scaffold of dark matter known as the Cosmic Web, an intergalactic network that transformed the universe from a chaotic Big Bang into the structured beauty of the present day cosmos.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: Cosmic rays capable of destroying human DNA are hurtling through outer space like subatomic bullets, causing space crews radiation damage.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Abandoned: Expedition Shipwreck
programme.desc: The remains of five warships could reveal new insights into how the nuclear arms race changed the world forever; using 3-D sonar scan technology, an expert team of marine scientists investigate the catastrophic effects of atomic explosions at sea.

programme.title: Abandoned: Expedition Shipwreck
programme.desc: The enigmatic shipwrecks of El Faro and the Empress of Ireland occurred a century apart and both remain a mystery of the sea; armed with the latest technology, experts explore these doomed ships to discover what set them on the path to catastrophe.

programme.title: Abandoned: Expedition Shipwreck
programme.desc: The aerial bombardment of the Japanese fleet and the torpedo strike of the Wilhelm Gustloff are two of the most shocking attacks of WWII; expert divers explore these underwater graveyards for new evidence of these maritime conflicts.

programme.title: Abandoned: Expedition Shipwreck
programme.desc: The USS Arizona and the HMS Hood were two of the most powerful warships in history, but their weaknesses paid a fatal price; experts investigate evidence that may reveal why the age of the battleship has come to a sudden and violent end.

programme.title: Abandoned: Expedition Shipwreck
programme.desc: The wreckages of three German U-boats are eroding at the bottom of the sea along with the stories behind their disastrous fate; now, a team of maritime archaeologists race to locate the submarines and solve the mystery behind their deadly demise.

programme.title: Abandoned: Expedition Shipwreck
programme.desc: For over a century, the stories and wrecks of HMS Hampshire and HMS Vanguard continue to be shrouded in mystery; two research teams are granted special access to investigate and uncover what happened to these WWI warships in their final moments.

programme.title: Abandoned: Expedition Shipwreck
programme.desc: Countless shipwrecks lost in the depths of the oceans are time capsules containing tales of adventure and tragedy; now, marine experts hunt to locate these forgotten ships, explore their secrets and unlock their incredible stories.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hidden America
programme.sub-title: Charity Hospital: The Big Easy's Fight for Survival
programme.desc: A beloved hospital in the Big Easy was once the site of heroic efforts by medical staff and volunteers to evacuate patients after Hurricane Katrina; the historic Charity Hospital is being revitalized by another major New Orleans institution.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hidden America
programme.sub-title: Butler Island Plantation: The South's Dark Secret
programme.desc: The notorious owner of this Georgia plantation once held a sale of nearly 450 enslaved people; appalled at her husband's cruelty, the man's wife wrote and published a journal about the atrocities she witnessed.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hidden America
programme.sub-title: The Wright Brothers: Cleared for Takeoff
programme.desc: An unassuming factory marks a revolutionary leap forward -- and upward -- in how humans travel; due to ongoing legal battles and innovative designs from their many competitors, these historic upstarts would soon be grounded.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hidden America
programme.desc: An upstart mining town fuels the American war effort in both World Wars with its bountiful deposits of lead and zinc; the dusty remains of the mining efforts that put Picher on the map would condemn the city to abandonment years later.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hidden America
programme.sub-title: Pullman, Chicago: The Town That Paralyzed the Nation
programme.desc: A railroad enterprise once built this company town for its workers to live in, but when thousands of employees went on strike, the military intervened; the history of the complex remains as relevant as ever.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hidden America
programme.desc: At a nondescript bowling alley in South Carolina, evidence of a peaceful student protest that turned deadly comes to light; a series of tunnels in L.A. becomes a shady place for resourceful people in this sunny city.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hidden America
programme.desc: An upstart mining town fuels the American war effort in both World Wars with its bountiful deposits of lead and zinc; the dusty remains of the mining efforts that put Picher on the map would condemn the city to abandonment years later.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hidden America
programme.sub-title: Pullman, Chicago: The Town That Paralyzed the Nation
programme.desc: A railroad enterprise once built this company town for its workers to live in, but when thousands of employees went on strike, the military intervened; the history of the complex remains as relevant as ever.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hidden America
programme.desc: At a nondescript bowling alley in South Carolina, evidence of a peaceful student protest that turned deadly comes to light; a series of tunnels in L.A. becomes a shady place for resourceful people in this sunny city.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hidden America
programme.sub-title: The Wright Brothers: Cleared for Takeoff
programme.desc: An unassuming factory marks a revolutionary leap forward -- and upward -- in how humans travel; due to ongoing legal battles and innovative designs from their many competitors, these historic upstarts would soon be grounded.

programme.title: Abandoned: Expedition Shipwreck
programme.desc: For over a century, the stories and wrecks of HMS Hampshire and HMS Vanguard continue to be shrouded in mystery; two research teams are granted special access to investigate and uncover what happened to these WWI warships in their final moments.

programme.title: Abandoned: Expedition Shipwreck
programme.desc: Countless shipwrecks lost in the depths of the oceans are time capsules containing tales of adventure and tragedy; now, marine experts hunt to locate these forgotten ships, explore their secrets and unlock their incredible stories.

programme.title: MythBusters
programme.sub-title: Star Wars: The Myths Strike Back
programme.desc: Myths Strike Back when Adam and Jamie once again confront the dark side of science in a workshop not so far away.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: MythBusters
programme.desc: Stow your tray tables because in this aviation extravaganza Adam and Jamie tackle two flights of fantasy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: MythBusters
programme.desc: The team tests if NASA really did land on the Moon.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: Exploring new discoveries that rewrite the history of the solar system, revealing a complex and violent story that begins with the birth of the sun from the debris of a massive galactic collision to its eventual fate as a lone zombie star.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: New astronomical research is beginning to reveal an invisible scaffold of dark matter known as the Cosmic Web, an intergalactic network that transformed the universe from a chaotic Big Bang into the structured beauty of the present day cosmos.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: Cosmic rays capable of destroying human DNA are hurtling through outer space like subatomic bullets, causing space crews radiation damage.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: Mars is infested with robots, orbiting the planet and roaming the Martian surface on a mission to uncover its secrets; now, Perseverance joins this dedicated group of machines to uncover if there is, or was ever, life on the Red Planet.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.sub-title: Most Violent Event in the Universe
programme.desc: The collision of two supermassive black holes is the most violent event that can occur in the universe; experts explore where a black hole's energy originates and what really happens when the two most powerful objects in the cosmos clash.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
